project.name: ProjectOps360° Budget & Cost Management Engine
project.objective: Diseñar e implementar un motor profesional de control financiero conectado al Core de ProjectOps360°, con PMO como dueño principal del presupuesto y trazabilidad completa hacia ejecución, riesgos, cambios, decisiones, Process Mining, Living Graph e Isabella.
non_goals_before_architecture_gate: No crear migraciones ni modificar tablas existentes.
No reemplazar la pantalla de presupuesto actual.
No crear un segundo Gantt ni un módulo financiero aislado del Core.
No permitir que Isabella apruebe, autorice o modifique información financiera.
No inventar fechas, estimaciones, accuracy ranges, baselines ni resultados históricos.
project.scheduling_policy: Las fechas y esfuerzos permanecen TBD hasta que P0 confirme capacidad, responsables y calendario. Las fases P7-P9 permanecen deferred hasta aprobar G6.

financial_authority_model.principle: El PMO controla el sistema financiero del proyecto. El PM consume la información, explica ejecución y puede proponer o mantener ETC/forecast únicamente cuando su rol y la delegación lo permitan.
financial_authority_model.isabella_authority: read_only_recommendation_explanation_and_simulation; never approve, post, release reserves, change baseline, or alter ledger entries

standards_and_references.title: Cost Estimate Classification System — Process Industries
standards_and_references.usage: Referencia principal para el adaptador de industrias de proceso: la clase se determina por madurez y calidad de entregables de definición; el porcentaje de diseño no es el determinante; la precisión requiere análisis de riesgo específico.
standards_and_references.scope_guardrail: No aplicar 18R-97 directamente a software, construcción comercial u otras industrias excluidas. El Core debe admitir estándares y matrices de madurez configurables por framework.

phases.name: Discovery, charter and governance baseline
phases.goal: Acordar el problema, autoridad financiera, alcance, realidad existente y reglas que gobiernan todo el trabajo posterior.

tasks.title: Approve objective, scope and non-goals
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The project is explicitly defined as a financial control engine connected to the Core, not an expense screen or parallel planning product.

tasks.title: Audit current financial capability and production data paths
tasks.deliverable: Current-state map of budget_items, cost_actuals, material requirements, procurement, health, reports and budget UI
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Every implemented object and gap is evidenced from code/schema; no capability is assumed from conversation memory.

tasks.title: Define financial RACI and segregation of duties
tasks.deliverable: Authority matrix by financial truth and transaction
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PMO ownership is explicit; PM rights are delegation-based; no role can request, approve and post the same controlled transaction.

tasks.title: Define source-of-truth and compatibility boundaries
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Existing budget and procurement data are evolved additively; no second event ledger, status engine, graph or financial truth is introduced.

tasks.title: Define representative PMO use cases and control questions
tasks.deliverable: Prioritized use-case catalog for project and portfolio financial control
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Use cases cover funding, baseline, commitments, actuals, accruals, forecast, exposure, changes, reserves, cash flow and decision support.

tasks.title: Approve discovery baseline and charter
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Scope, ownership, current state, non-goals and success measures are approved and traceable.

phases.name: Canonical financial domain model
phases.goal: Definir las verdades financieras, dimensiones, relaciones, estados y eventos que constituirán el lenguaje universal del motor.

tasks.title: Define the six canonical financial truths and cash-flow separation
tasks.deliverable: Canonical definitions for Funding, Original Budget, Current Baseline, Commitments, Actual Cost, Forecast and Cash Flow
tasks.acceptance_criteria: No field or metric conflates authorization, obligation, incurred cost, payment or forecast.

tasks.title: Define CBS hierarchy and WBS/control-account linkage
tasks.deliverable: CBS ontology and linkage rules to project, phase, milestone, task and control account
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Every financial line can roll up by CBS and trace to execution scope without forcing one budget line per task.

tasks.title: Define financial dimensions and traceability references
tasks.deliverable: Dimension model for cost code, resource, supplier, contract, department, location, country, currency, risk, change and decision
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Dimensions support drill-down and portfolio rollup while preserving organization and project isolation.

tasks.title: Define currency, FX, fiscal period and accounting-date semantics
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Transaction, project and reporting currencies; FX source/date; incurred, posting, invoice and payment dates are distinct.

tasks.title: Define lifecycle state machines and invariants
tasks.deliverable: State diagrams for estimate, budget, baseline, commitment, actual, accrual, payment, change and reserve
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Invalid transitions, silent baseline edits and cross-period rewrites are explicitly prevented.

tasks.title: Define canonical financial events and provenance envelope
tasks.deliverable: Financial event vocabulary mapped to the existing Project Event Log
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Events are immutable facts with actor, source, evidence, financial object references and idempotency; no second event store is proposed.

tasks.title: Approve canonical financial domain model
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Definitions, dimensions, lifecycles, events and ownership are internally consistent and approved.

phases.name: Estimating, classification and baseline architecture
phases.goal: Controlar cómo nace, madura, se justifica, aprueba y versiona un estimado hasta convertirse en baseline.

tasks.title: Define Basis of Estimate contract
tasks.deliverable: Basis of Estimate schema and required evidence
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Every estimate version identifies purpose, scope, exclusions, assumptions, methods, sources, maturity, risks, contingency, currency and approvers.

tasks.title: Design configurable estimate-classification framework
tasks.deliverable: Universal classification contract with framework-specific adapters
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The Core stores classification scheme, class, maturity evidence and determination basis without hardcoding one industry's rules.

tasks.title: Define AACE 18R-97 process-industries maturity adapter
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Class determination is based on defining-deliverable maturity and quality; nominal design percentage is not used as the sole determinant; accuracy is not presented as guaranteed.

tasks.title: Define estimate versioning, comparison and supersession rules
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Prior estimates remain traceable; revisions identify changed assumptions, scope, quantities, rates, risks and approvals.

tasks.title: Define approval, original budget and rebaseline lifecycle
tasks.accountable_role: PMO Admin / Sponsor according to thresholds
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Original Budget is immutable; Current Baseline changes only through approved change control; pending changes remain separate.

tasks.title: Approve estimating and baseline architecture
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Basis of Estimate, classification adapters, versions and baseline lifecycle are approved.

phases.name: Financial ledger, changes, reserves and governance
phases.goal: Definir el registro controlado de autorizaciones, obligaciones, costos, pagos, reservas y correcciones.

tasks.title: Design funding authorization ledger
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Authorized, released, restricted and remaining funds are separately traceable by approval and effective period.

tasks.title: Design commitments, contracts and purchase-order ledger
tasks.deliverable: Commitment lifecycle and line-level linkage model
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Original, revised, consumed, cancelled and outstanding commitment values reconcile to contract/PO evidence.

tasks.title: Design actual-cost, accrual and reversal ledger
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Incurred cost, posted actual, accrual, reversal and source document are distinct, balanced and period-aware.

tasks.title: Design payment and cash-flow ledger
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Payment does not alter incurred-cost timing; forecast cash flow supports planned, committed, invoiced and paid states.

tasks.title: Design change control, contingency and management reserve
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Pending, approved, rejected and emergency changes remain distinct; contingency is tied to identified risks; management reserve is separately governed.

tasks.title: Define correction, idempotency, reconciliation and period-close controls
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Imports are retry-safe; corrections use reversal/adjustment rather than silent rewrite; ledgers reconcile; closed periods require controlled reopening.

tasks.title: Approve ledger, security and governance architecture
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Ledger boundaries, approvals, SoD, correction controls and audit requirements are approved.

phases.name: Performance measurement and forecast engine
phases.goal: Definir cálculos determinísticos, escenarios de costo final, incertidumbre y calidad de forecast.

tasks.title: Define canonical formula contract for BAC, PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI, CV and SV
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Inputs, cut-off date, null/zero handling, units and limitations are explicit; SPI is not represented as calendar delay.

tasks.title: Define earned-value methods and progress evidence
tasks.deliverable: EV method catalog and eligibility rules
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 0/100, weighted milestone, units complete, apportioned effort and level-of-effort methods require explicit configuration and evidence.

tasks.title: Define deterministic EAC and ETC scenarios
tasks.deliverable: Bottom-up, CPI-based, CPI/SPI and PM forecast scenario definitions
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Each scenario identifies formula, assumptions, applicability, confidence, source data and human override rationale.

tasks.title: Define probabilistic P50/P80 cost forecast and sensitivity model
tasks.acceptance_criteria: P50/P80 are produced only from documented distributions, correlations, uncertainty and risk inputs; insufficient data yields an honest unavailable state.

tasks.title: Define TCPI, burn rate, remaining funds and cost exposure metrics
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Metrics distinguish actual, commitment and uncommitted forecast exposure and identify mathematically unrealistic recovery requirements.

tasks.title: Create reference datasets and expected calculation results
tasks.deliverable: Golden datasets for normal, incomplete, zero-value, overrun and multi-currency cases
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Expected outputs are independently calculated and approved before engine implementation.

tasks.title: Validate and approve measurement and forecast formulas
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All formulas reproduce the approved golden results and document their limitations.

phases.name: Core integration, PMO experience and Isabella
phases.goal: Diseñar cómo el motor financiero utiliza las funciones actuales de ProjectOps360° sin convertirse en una aplicación separada.

tasks.title: Design PMO financial control cockpit and portfolio rollups
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PMO can compare funding, baseline, exposure, EAC, variance, reserve and confidence across projects with drill-down to evidence.

tasks.title: Design role-specific PM, Sponsor, Finance and Procurement experiences
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PM can work without being forced to administer budget; controlled financial actions remain permission- and approval-gated.

tasks.title: Design evolution of the existing project budget surface
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Existing material estimate capability remains available and is mapped into the new estimating layer; no current function is silently replaced.

tasks.title: Design Living Graph financial nodes, edges and overlays
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Budget, commitment, actual, change and forecast relationships are projections over canonical sources and never create a parallel truth or decorative graph.

tasks.title: Design Process Mining and root-cause financial analysis
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Analysis separates temporal order, explicit causality and correlation; no cost cause is invented from proximity.

tasks.title: Design Isabella Cost Intelligence tools and human-approval boundaries
tasks.deliverable: Read-only tool contracts, explanations, simulations and refusal rules
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Every statement cites source data and formula/scenario; Isabella cannot approve, post, change baseline or release reserves.

tasks.title: Approve PMO experience and Core integration architecture
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The design is PMO-first, role-safe, responsive and fully integrated with existing ProjectOps360° capabilities.

phases.name: Architecture package and implementation readiness
phases.goal: Convertir las decisiones aprobadas en un paquete implementable, seguro, probado y reversible.

tasks.title: Publish canonical architecture, capability specification and ADRs
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Current reality, target architecture, non-goals, contracts, decisions, risks and phased roadmap are explicit and non-contradictory.

tasks.title: Design additive schema, compatibility and migration sequence
tasks.deliverable: Migration and compatibility plan with rollback boundaries
tasks.acceptance_criteria: No destructive migration or automatic reinterpretation of legacy values; backfill is explicit, idempotent and evidence-aware.

tasks.title: Define RBAC, RLS, approval thresholds and threat model
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Tenant/project isolation, least privilege, SoD and server/database enforcement are testable; UI hiding is never the only control.

tasks.title: Define test strategy, golden data and reconciliation gates
tasks.deliverable: Unit, property, integration, RLS, migration, reconciliation and UAT plan
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Every financial invariant and approval boundary has an executable verification strategy before implementation begins.

tasks.title: Define feature flags, pilot data, observability and rollback plan
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Foundation, writers, projections and UI can be activated independently; failures are visible; rollback never deletes ledger history.

tasks.title: Conduct final architecture review and authorize implementation
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Architecture, security, data, formulas, UX, tests and rollout are approved; only this gate changes P7-P9 from deferred to executable.

phases.name: Foundation implementation
phases.goal: Implementar únicamente la base aprobada, de forma aditiva, segura y verificable en stage.

tasks.title: Implement additive financial schema and compatibility layer
tasks.deliverable: Stage migration and compatibility read model
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Migration is additive, idempotent and validated against representative legacy projects.

tasks.title: Implement canonical financial domain contracts and pure calculation primitives
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Contracts preserve canonical definitions and reject invalid states before persistence.

tasks.title: Implement controlled financial event writers and object references
tasks.deliverable: Atomic append paths into the existing Project Event Log
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Writes are atomic, idempotent, tenant-scoped and append-only; no fire-and-forget financial facts.

tasks.title: Implement RBAC, RLS and approval enforcement
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Unauthorized cross-org/project access and unauthorized approvals fail in executable tests.

tasks.title: Implement financial projections, reconciliations and observability
tasks.deliverable: Read models and reconciliation health signals
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Rollups reconcile to ledger facts; stale, partial or inconsistent data produces explicit status rather than fabricated totals.

tasks.title: Validate foundation implementation in stage
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Migrations, invariants, permissions, event capture, reconciliations, typecheck, tests and build pass.

phases.name: Financial workflows and Core surfaces
phases.goal: Implementar los workflows y superficies aprobados sobre la fundación validada.

tasks.title: Implement estimating, Basis of Estimate, versioning and baseline workflows
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Estimate maturity, evidence, versions and approvals work without replacing existing material estimating.

tasks.title: Implement funding, commitments, actuals, accruals, payments and reconciliation workflows
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Each transaction follows its authority, evidence, period and correction rules and reconciles to approved scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement changes, reserves, EVM and forecast scenarios
tasks.deliverable: Change control and forecast engine workflows
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Approved changes affect Current Baseline; pending/rejected changes do not; all approved formulas match golden datasets.

tasks.title: Implement PMO cockpit and role-specific project views
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Each role sees actionable, permission-appropriate information on desktop, tablet and phone without a separate Gantt.

tasks.title: Integrate Living Graph, Process Mining, reports and Isabella
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All surfaces consume canonical projections; Isabella remains grounded and read-only; existing Core functions remain intact.

tasks.title: Complete end-to-end PMO and Finance UAT in stage
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Representative projects reconcile end-to-end and all role, approval, audit, responsive and regression scenarios pass.

phases.name: Pilot, production readiness and rollout
phases.goal: Validar con datos reales, desplegar de forma controlada y medir calidad financiera después del release.

tasks.title: Prepare governed pilot projects and real financial datasets
tasks.deliverable: Authorized pilot dataset and privacy classification
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Pilot data are representative, authorized, traceable and isolated; missing history is documented rather than synthesized.

tasks.title: Validate financial reconciliation and audit traceability
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Funding, baseline, commitments, actuals, accruals, payments, forecast and reserves reconcile to source evidence and approved formulas.

tasks.title: Validate forecast quality, calibration and bad-learning prevention
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Historical sufficiency is measured; low-volume results are labeled; no automated learning or predictive claim proceeds without approved quality thresholds.

tasks.title: Complete performance, security, disaster recovery and rollback validation
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Performance budgets, tenant isolation, backup/restore, feature-flag rollback and ledger-history preservation are verified.

tasks.title: Prepare training, operating procedures and support readiness
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PMO, PM, Finance, Procurement and Sponsor procedures explain authority, controls, exceptions and escalation paths.

tasks.title: Approve production release and post-release control window
tasks.deliverable: G9 production authorization and monitoring plan
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All release gates are approved; production activation is staged; KPIs, reconciliation and incident thresholds are monitored through the control window.
